endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Compute.Admin/locations/{location}/diskmigrationjobs
endpoints.description: Returns a list of disk migration jobs.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Compute.Admin/locations/{location}/diskmigrationjobs/{migrationId}
endpoints.description: Returns the requested disk migration job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{MIGRATIONID}} with a real migrationid.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Compute.Admin/locations/{location}/diskmigrationjobs/{migrationId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{MIGRATIONID}} with a real migrationid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Compute.Admin/locations/{location}/diskmigrationjobs/{migrationId}/Cancel
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{MIGRATIONID}} with a real migrationid.
